question: Find the original artists who sing songs with rhythm tempo above 5 , and list results in descending order of voice sound quality .
sql: SELECT s.original_artist FROM songs s JOIN performance_score p ON s.id = p.songs_id WHERE p.rhythm_tempo > 5 ORDER BY p.voice_sound_quality DESC;

back_translation.intent: 查询歌曲的原始艺术家

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求查找演唱节奏速度高于5的歌曲的原始艺术家，并按声音质量降序排列。SQL反向翻译描述中正确引用了songs和performance_score表，选择了s.original_artist列，应用了p.rhythm_tempo > 5的过滤条件，并按p.voice_sound_quality DESC排序，与原始问题的意图一致。
